codeReview.summary: The commit cleanly extracts inline duration literals into package-level named constants across all targeted packages and documents the two intentional context.Background() usages. Changes are behavior-preserving substitutions of literal values with equivalent constants; no correctness regressions were identified in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance says to group related durations in const blocks, but validation uses grep filters (`grep -v 'const |var '`) that still count const-block member lines as inline literals. This creates contradictory incentives and can cause avoidable churn in implementation style.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md constants section: "Group related constants in a `const` block"; validation-contract.md VAL-ERR-008..013 evidence commands exclude only lines containing literal "const " or "var "; handoff skillFeedback explicitly notes this mismatch.

summary: Pass: feature requirements are met for duration-constant extraction and context.Background rationale comments, with no blocking or non-blocking code defects found in the reviewed commit.
